description.from: Takes aim and prepares to fire. When reused or when preparation is complete, deals 1120*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)) + 710.2% ATK P.DMG to enemies in a straight line. DMG increases based on cast time up to 150%, and at max charge, knocks enemies down.
description.to: Upon activation, takes up a stance and starts casting. After casting ends, deals ??? P.DMG upon enemies in a straight line. DMG is increased by 150% in proportion to the total casting time. If casting progresses beyond the 3rd stage, knock over enemies.

description.from:
For 15sec, Increases ATK by 135*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)) and applies [Perfect Aim] to the target.

[Perfect Aim]: DMG dealt by Rodina is increased by 50%.all skills prioritize enemies under [Perfect Aim]
description.to: Target receives 50% increased damage from this hero. In addition, own ATK is increased by ???.

description.from: Fires at random enemies, dealing 245*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)) + 155% ATK P.DMG 10 times. Each shot increases DMG by 10% and ATK Spd by 10%.
description.to: Fires 10 shots at random. Deals ??? DMG upon attack, and per each attack, DMG is increased by 10%.

description.from: Deals 354*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)) + 224.4% ATK P.DMG 2 times every 10sec.
description.to: Every 10 sec, attacks the target 2 times, dealing a total of ??? P.DMG.

IV.from: Critical Damage of this skill is increased by 80%.
Increases Crit DMG by 60% for the duration of Skill.
IV.to: Crit DMG is increased by 50% for the duration of skill.

IV.from: Critical Damage of this skill is increased by 80%.

light.from: Mana cost increases by 1000, but damage scaling with cast time increases up to 450%.
During the duration, ATK Spd is increased by 15%.
light.to: ATK Spd is boosted by 250 for the duration.

light.from: Mana cost is increased by 1000, and the number of targets is increased by 1.
light.to: Increases Mana Cost by 1 and the number of targets by 1.

dark.from: Mana cost is increased by 1000, and effect increase on attack is increased by 100%.

dark.to: Enemies hit are stunned for 2 sec.

description.from: [Penetration Shot] While casting, increases ATK SPD by 80%, and on Critical Hit, increases own ATK by {0}% for 10 sec. This ATK increase stacks up to 2 times.
description.to: [Penetration Shot] Takes 40% reduced P.DMG and M.DMG for the skill's duration, and upon Critical Hit, increases own ATK by {0}% for 10 sec. ATK increase can be stacked up to max 4 times.

description.from: [Target Aim] When Rodina's target dies, switches to a random enemy and increases own ATK by {0}% for 10 sec.
description.to: [Target Aim] Changes the target to a random enemy when Rodina's target dies, increasing ATK by {0}% for 10 sec.

description.from: [Focused Fire] Increases DMG by {0}%, and the last 2 shots deal DEF-ignoring DMG.
description.to: [Focus Fire] Increased DMG by {0}% and inflicts damage ingnoring the target's DEF with the last 2 shots.

description.from: [Consecutive Shot] Changes the number of targets to 2, and reduces the target's P.Crit Resist by {0} for 10 sec.
description.to: [Consecutive Shot] Changes the number of targets to 2. Hit enemies have their P.Crit Resistance reduced by {0} for 10 sec.

description.from: On hit, deals additional P.DMG equal to {0}% of ATK, knocks the enemy back, and increases ACC by {1} for 10 sec. This ACC increase stacks up to 3 times and can be triggered once every 4 sec.
description.to: Each attack has a 20% chance of dealing {0}% of ATK as extra P.DMG and knocking back the enemy. Afterwards, ACC is increased by 100 for 10 sec. This effect can be stacked up to 3 times max.

description.from: Summons the soul of Rodina Custom Rifle Mod.0 for 10sec, increasing own Crit DMG by 70%. During the duration, every 2sec, deals [DAMAGE] P.DMG to an enemy and stuns the target for 1sec. If the target is a Boss, the DMG and Stun duration are increased by 2%.
description.to: Summons the soul of Rodina Custom Rifle Mod.0, increasing own Crit DMG by 100% for 10 sec. For the duration of Skill, deals ??? P.DMG that ignores DEF every 2 sec and inflicts Stun on the hit target for 2 sec. If the target is a Boss, the DMG and duration of Stun increases by 2 times.

2.from: Becomes immune to CC for 5 sec.
2.to: Increases DMG by 50% and gains immunity to CC for the duration of Skill.
